title: Onyx's Molten Netherite
description: Makes netherite hot and melty, aka molten.
body:
it makes netherite molten, idk what else people expect. \
Reuploaded from my [Planet Minecraft ](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/molten-netherite/) \
Open to any feeback and suggestions (please) \
also, this was one of my first resource packs from 2023, so if its bad then thats why lol
